name: Pear Plugins
description: The browser-curated plugin catalogue. Publish this directory as a Hyperdrive (scripts/publish-and-pin.js catalogues/pear-plugins --name pear-plugins-catalog) and subscribers hot-load it from Settings. Entries with an empty driveKey are placeholders: publish the plugin drive first, paste its key here, bump nothing else, and re-publish this catalogue.

plugins.name: anonGPT
plugins.description: Private AI chat as a P2P app. Uses the window.pear.anongpt bridge; PearBrowser verifies the app's no-prompt-storage privacy manifest before the bridge is injected, and only on this drive.
plugins.author: anonGPT

plugins.name: Pear Dark Reader
plugins.description: Dark, high-contrast theme for every hyper:// page. Styles only — no scripts, no network rules. Source: examples/plugins/dark-reader.
plugins.author: PearBrowser examples

plugins.name: peerit Enhancer
plugins.description: Compact rows, reading-width cap, and j/k keyboard navigation for peerit. Scoped to the peerit drive only. Source: examples/plugins/peerit-enhancer.
plugins.author: PearBrowser examples
